tip1: You can bribe hostile ships to persuade them to trade with you.
tip2: Once slaughtered, various creatures can be butchered for food and other resources.
tip3: Try to manage interior ship operations while in high burn.
tip4: Uncontrolled fires can be devastating and should be dealt with swiftly.
tip5: Different stars affect your ship's temperature differently. Make sure adequate cooling systems are installed.
tip6: Fires will only start or continue to burn if the room has enough oxygen.
tip7: Some items can become highly volatile if caught in a fire.
tip8: Toggle Black Alert on the ships systems menu to ensure all of your crew go back to and stay inside of the ship.
tip9: Offloading firearms within ship interiors can be extrememly dangerous. Consider using melee weapons instead.
tip10: If you find you have no space for storage inside of your ship, consider placing a temporary storage outside. Be aware that this is temporary for a reason though.
tip11: A ship and its crew will run much better with a good captain at its helm.
tip12: With the right cooling systems installed, you can safely approach and mine the high value asteroids formed under a blue giant's extreme heat.
